name: 下海多少天的日期后边素材

empty it before heading out to sea!

No available dives.
Daily login gives 5 dives!

Colorful fish are said to appear in the 
deep sea, bringing luck. They swim 
quickly, so use a booster to catch them!

Really?How do I use this propuision 
device?

You need a power pack t activate the 
booster. some have found them in the 
deep sea, but beginners can start 
exploring the shallow areas first!
